case_title: RICHARD D. GREENFIELD VS. AMERICAN EXPRESS COMPANY

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JUL-02-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-21-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GREENFIELD, RICHARD D. AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN EXPRESS COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-02-2019 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK:RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: DEFENDANT - AMERICAN EXPRESS COMPANY; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-21-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-15-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREENFIELD, RICHARD D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN EXPRESS COMPANY $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,115.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-02-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-02-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF RICHARD D. GREENFIELD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMERICAN EXPRESS COMPANY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ROBERT REBNAN. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
